hooks.command: echo 'Reminders: Use ruff for formatting. Run pytest before committing. Type hints on all functions. Prefer vectorized operations over row iteration. Check ~/.claude/rules/ for full guidelines.'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"REMINDER: Always find the root cause before fixing. Read the source, trace the call chain. Simple fix at the source > complex workaround. Use /debug for structured analysis."}}'

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); printf '\033[01;32m%s@%s\033[00m:\033[01;34m%s\033[00m' "$(whoami)" "$(hostname -s)" "$cwd"; branch=$(cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$branch" ] && printf ' \033[01;35m(%s)\033[00m' "$branch"; [ -n "$used" ] && printf ' \033[01;33m[Context: %.1f%%]\033[00m' "$used"; echo
